# External Data Note

The paper's real-data workflow uses STARloc data that is not redistributed in this public package.

Place the following files here before running the real-data scripts:

- `starloc_data_grid_s3_uwb.csv`
- `uwb_markers_v2.csv`

Original source:

- [utiasASRL/starloc](https://github.com/utiasASRL/starloc)

This package references the filenames above so that the real-data workflow can run without editing code after the external files are supplied locally.
